title: desmanthus luteus
intro: Desmanthus luteus, also known as yellow false dandelion, is a flowering plant native to East Asia and parts of Europe, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and pinnately lobed leaves. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve symptoms of indigestion and nausea. Desmanthus luteus has been shown to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, acting as an antioxidant, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat a range of ailments.
